_comment: Combo packages: if any 'trigger' card is in the candidate pool, ensure at least one 'partner' card gets prioritized in slot filling. By default partners are 'any' (one is enough); set 'require_all': true when the combo genuinely needs every partner (e.g. three-card storm setups). Maintain by hand based on Commander format knowledge — engine has no way to derive these from EDHREC data.

thoracle-combo.description: Thoracle wincon — Oracle ETB while library is empty

mikaeus-trike.description: Undying + sac outlet kills the table

isochron-reversal.description: Infinite mana with rocks + DR imprinted on Scepter

ad-nauseam.description: Ad Nauseam without dying needs life-protection

underworld-breach-storm.description: Storm wincon — Breach plus LED plus a mill payoff

food-chain.description: Infinite mana via Food Chain + exile-castable creature

necrotic-ooze-combo.description: Necrotic Ooze inheriting Devoted Druid + ramp = infinite mana

demonic-consult-jace.description: Library-exile cards need a wincon to capitalise on empty library

kalamax-tap.description: Damage-on-cast plus draw-on-damage = loop until library is gone
